name: Leva
when_to_use: 已有 React 组件树且需要把声明式 schema 变成实时调参面板时用它而非手写,因为原生在复合控件、store 联动和紧凑布局上失败;非做业务长表单或提交表单。
why_valuable: AI 默认会重复写 useState 加 input,但做不到从同一 schema 稳定生成数值、颜色、区间与枚举控件并让 React store 同步;Leva 把面板和值读取收敛到 useControls。

data_in.note: controls 原样交给 useControls(schema,{store});简单标量可直接作为值,需要约束时用 {value,...settings},不要把统一事件契约塞进 schema。

schema.controls: Record<string, string|number|boolean|{value:string|number|boolean|number[],min?:number,max?:number,step?:number,options?:string[]|number[]|Record<string,string|number>,label?:string}>;min/max 默认无显式边界,step 默认由 Leva 推断,options/label 默认省略

boot.widget: unsupported:Leva 0.10.1 的 Stitches 规则注入 document.head,没有把完整动态样式表稳定定向到 widget shadowRoot 的原生选项;节点即使落 shadow 也会失去样式,不满足铁律 2。
boot.codex: 同 artifact(sandbox iframe):React 19.2.0 与 Leva 的 jsDelivr peer URL 对齐,用 useCreateStore + useControls + LevaPanel 原生 API 挂载。

example._why: Leva 控件既可写标量也可写深一层 settings,最小样例校准 useControls 的 schema 层级。

carriers.widget: unsupported:Stitches 动态 CSS 固定写 document.head,无法满足 shadow 零足迹
carriers.codex: supported:sandbox iframe 隔离 React 与 Stitches 的 document.head 足迹

isolation.evidence: leva 0.10.1 打包 Stitches(+esm 命中 'stitches';@stitches/react 运行时向 document.head 注入 <style>,无重定向到 shadowRoot 的 API);package.json deps 含 @radix-ui/react-portal + @radix-ui/react-tooltip → tooltip/portal 挂 document.body;拖拽/tooltip 绑 window/document 事件。节点即便落 shadow 也失去 Stitches 样式(铁律2)且 portal 逃逸 → widget 不成立。Stitches 具体 insertRule 调用未逐行验(故 med)。

en.when_to_use: Use it when an existing React component tree needs a declarative schema turned into a live parameter panel instead of building one by hand, which fails at compound controls, store synchronization, and compact layout. Not for long business forms or submit-based forms.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults repeatedly write useState plus input but cannot reliably generate numeric, color, range, and enum controls from the same schema while keeping the React store synchronized; Leva unifies panel generation and value access in useControls.

data_in.note: controls is passed unchanged to useControls(schema,{store}); a simple scalar can be the value directly, while constrained values use {value,...settings}. Do not insert a unified event contract into the schema.

schema.controls: Record<string, string|number|boolean|{value:string|number|boolean|number[],min?:number,max?:number,step?:number,options?:string[]|number[]|Record<string,string|number>,label?:string}>; min/max have no explicit bounds by default, step is inferred by Leva, and options/label are omitted by default
